title: Sobolev embeddings with weights in complete riemannian manifolds
comment:
We introduce the notion of "weak bounded geometry" which allows us to
  improve clearly known results for Sobolev embeddings or Gaffney's inequality
  in complete non-compact riemannian manifolds. arXiv admin note: text overlap
  with arXiv:1812.04411
summary:
We prove Sobolev embedding Theorems with weights for vector bundles in a
complete riemannian manifold. We also get general Gaffney's inequality with
weights. As a consequence, under a "weak bounded geometry" hypothesis, we
improve classical Sobolev embedding Theorems for vector bundles in a complete
riemannian manifold. We also improve known results on Gaffney's inequality in a
complete riemannian manifold.

title: Stabilization for vibrating plate with singular structural damping
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1805.10430
summary:
We consider the dynamic elasticity equation, modeled by the Euler-Bernoulli
plate equation, with a locally distributed singular structural (or viscoelastic
) damping in a boundary domain. Using a frequency domain method combined, based
on the Burq's result, combined with an estimate of Carleman type we provide
precise decay estimate showing that the energy of the system decays
logarithmically as the type goes to the infinity.
